          We buy USD: 1130, EURO: 1200, GBP: 1340, CAD: 770, RAND: 52, WON: 425, CAMEROUN CEFA CASH: 1620, COTONOU CEFA: 1660, We sell USD: 1150, RAND: 66, CAD: 880, EURO: 1220, GBP: 1410, CFA: 1690, CTO: 1710, RMB ACCT/ALIPAY: 158/160.
